Description: ESP32 dual-core with Classic BT/BLE 8MB PSRAM 16MB Flash
Stereo 24-bit ADC I2S slave 8-192kHz for A2DP
1A LiPo charger with power path USB input 4.2V
150mA 3.3V ultra-low noise LDO 110dB PSRR for analog
Dual rail-to-rail ESD protection on USB D+/D-
3.5mm TRRS audio jack with insertion detect
USB-C 2.0 charging and UART programming port
Tactile push button IO0 boot mode
SPDT slide switch main power on/off
SPI CLK series termination to LCD
SPI MOSI series termination to LCD
